mapper.sql: id, data_source_id, task_id, product, cluster, create_time, modify_time
mapper.insert: insert into task_datasource (id, data_source_id, task_id, product, cluster, create_time, modify_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataSourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into task_datasource
id,
data_source_id,
task_id,
product,
cluster,
create_time,
modify_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{dataSourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update task_datasource
data_source_id = #{dataSourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product = #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cluster = #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update task_datasource set data_source_id = #{dataSourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product = #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cluster = #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
